record.field: UAE - Branch Named Account List for Approval

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly Approve Named Accounts

Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=named.accounts

Branch: ${object.branch_id.name}

Thank You
KSA - Branch Named Account List for Approval

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly Approve Named Accounts

Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=named.accounts

Branch: ${object.branch_id.name}

Thank You

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly Approve Change of Named Accounts

Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=named.accounts

Branch: ${object.branch_id.name}

Thank You

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly Approve Change of Named Accounts

Link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=named.accounts

Thank You

Branch: ${object.branch_id.name}

Branch: ${object.branch_id.name}

Dear ,

The Following Opportunity Set to Cancel..

Info

  • Opportunity Number: ${object.od_number}
  • Subject: ${object.name}
  • Customer: ${object.partner_id.name}
  • Customer AM: ${object.partner_id.user_id.name}
  • Lead AM: ${object.od_lead_user_id.name}

  • What we should/shouldn’t do to avoid losing it?: ${object.sm_io2}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=crm.lead&menu_id=137&action=144

Thank You

Request for Reviewing Service team Activity

Dear ${object.user_id.name}, ,

Kindly review the service team activities.

https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.tech.ticket.approval&menu_id=1183&action=1783

Thank You
Handover from Projects to Service Desk - Project #: ${object.final_doc_folder.analytic_account_id.code}

Dear Service Desk Team,

The below project is handed over to you. You need to review it, ensure that all supporting documents, backup configurations, SLA contracts, principle vendor license activation, serial numbers, etc. are available. Make sure you set all necessary Preventive Maintenance dates if requested in the contract.

  • Customer Name: ${object.customer_id.name}
  • Project Name: ${object.final_doc_folder.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=handover.service&menu_id=1181&action=1774

Thank You
Handover from Projects to Service Desk - Project #: ${object.final_doc_folder.analytic_account_id.code}

Dear Service Desk Team,

The below project is handed over to you. You need to review it, ensure that all supporting documents, backup configurations, SLA contracts, principle vendor license activation, serial numbers, etc. are available. Make sure you set all necessary Preventive Maintenance dates if requested in the contract.

  • Customer Name: ${object.customer_id.name}
  • Project Name: ${object.final_doc_folder.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=handover.service&menu_id=1181&action=1774

Thank You
Handover Rejected by Service Desk - Project #: ${object.final_doc_folder.analytic_account_id.code}

Dear ${object.od_proj_manager.name},

The below project hand over is rejected by service desk. Make sure that all supporting documents, backup configurations, SLA contracts, principle vendor license activation, serial numbers, etc. are provided.

  • Customer Name: ${object.customer_id.name}
  • Project Name: ${object.final_doc_folder.name}
  • Reason for reject: ${object.rej_reasn}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=handover.service&menu_id=1181&action=1774

Thank You
Handover Rejected by Service Desk - Project #: ${object.final_doc_folder.analytic_account_id.code}

Dear ${object.od_proj_manager.name},

The below project hand over is rejected by service desk. Make sure that all supporting documents, backup configurations, SLA contracts, principle vendor license activation, serial numbers, etc. are provided.

  • Customer Name: ${object.customer_id.name}
  • Project Name: ${object.final_doc_folder.name}
  • Reason for reject: ${object.rej_reasn}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=handover.service&menu_id=1181&action=1774

Thank You
UAE -Request to Verify a Bid Bond LG

Dear Finance Team,

We need to issue a ${object.guarantee_name} LG for the following. Kindly review & verify it.

Info

  • Opportunity Number: ${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • Customer: ${object.partner_id.name}
  • Customer AM: ${object.partner_id.user_id.name}
  • Lead AM: ${object.lead_id.od_lead_user_id.name}
  • Job Name/Desc: ${object.job_name}
  • Job Amount: ${object.job_amt}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.lg.request.form

Thank You
KSA -Request to Verify a Bid Bond LG

Dear Finance Team,

We need to issue a ${object.guarantee_name} LG for the following. Kindly review & verify it.

Info

  • Opportunity Number: ${object.lead_id.od_number}
  • Customer: ${object.partner_id.name}
  • Customer AM: ${object.partner_id.user_id.name}
  • Lead AM: ${object.lead_id.od_lead_user_id.name}

  • Job Amount: ${object.job_amt}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.lg.request.form

Thank You

The below ${object.guarantee_name} LG request has been reviewed and verified by Finance Team. We require your approval.

  • Customer: ${object.partner_id.name}
  • Customer AM: ${object.partner_id.user_id.name}

  • Job Amount: ${object.job_amt}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.lg.request.form

Thank You

UAE - Help Issue created through Portal

Dear Support Team,

A query has been submitted by ${object.contact_id.name}, your immediate action and timely update is highly appreciated.

Query Name : ${object.name}
Customer Name : ${object.customer_id.name}
Priority : ${object.priority}

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=helpdesk.portal&menu_id=1189&action=1821

Thank You.
KSA - Help Issue created through Portal

Dear Support Team,

A query has been submitted by ${object.contact_id.name}, your immediate action and timely update is highly appreciated.

Query Name : ${object.name}
Customer Name : ${object.customer_id.name}
Priority : ${object.priority}

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=helpdesk.portal&menu_id=1189&action=1821

Thank You.
UAE - Help Issue created through Portal Approved
Query Submitted through Portal Approved - Ticket # ${object.od_hd_issue_seq}

Dear Valued Customer,

Thanks for submitting the request. Ticket has been raised. We will look into the request and process accordingly.
You will be receiving further updates/notifications on the ticket.

Query Name : ${object.name}

Best Regards,
Service Desk - Beta IT
KSA - Help Issue created through Portal Approved
Query Submitted through Portal Approved - Ticket # ${object.od_hd_issue_seq}

Dear Valued Customer,

Thanks for submitting the request. Ticket has been raised. We will look into the request and process accordingly.
You will be receiving further updates/notifications on the ticket.

Query Name : ${object.name}

Best Regards,
Service Desk - Beta IT
UAE - Help Issue Rejected by Service Desk

Dear Valued Customer,

Thanks for submitting the request, we regret to inform that request has been rejected as it is out of SLA Scope. Kindly contact your Account Manager and we thank you for your understanding.

Query Name : ${object.name}
Link : https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=helpdesk.portal&action=1816

Best Regards,
Service Desk - Beta IT
KSA - Help Issue Rejected by Service Desk

Dear Valued Customer,

Thanks for submitting the request, we regret to inform that request has been rejected as it is out of SLA Scope. Kindly contact your Account Manager and we thank you for your understanding.

Query Name : ${object.name}
Link : https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=helpdesk.portal&action=1816

Best Regards,
Service Desk - Beta IT
KSA - Customer Visit by SA Approval

Dear ${object.manager_id.name},

Kindly Approve the below Customer Visit Report of Engineer ${object.employee_id.name}

Link : https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=customer.visit.report&menu_id=1196&action=1874

Thank you

Dear Team,

Kindly Approve the Joining form of Out Sourced Employee

Link : https://erp.betait.net//web#id=${object.id}&&view_type=form&model=outsource.employee.join.form&menu_id=1201&action=1873

Thank you
ERP Automatic Email

Dear Project Manager,
